channel.title: Office on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Office on Arrans github.io

item.title: massgravel/Microsoft-Activation-Scripts
item.description: A Windows and Office activator using HWID / Ohook / KMS38 / Online KMS activation methods, with a focus on open-source code and fewer antivirus detections.

item.title: qax-os/excelize
item.description: Go language library for reading and writing Microsoft Excel™ (XLAM / XLSM / XLSX / XLTM / XLTX) spreadsheets
